messages.content: “设计并构建了适用于《Save the Girl》/《Mr. Bullet》等所有超休闲游戏的数据架构，数分平台，看板，北极星指标制定及计算逻辑， 负责整个游戏品类的完整分析周期，从用户获取、留存、游戏进程漏斗、玩家参与度、广告效果到内购转化” 翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译

Designed and implemented a data architecture applicable to all hyper-casual games such as "Save the Girl" and "Mr. Bullet", including data platforms, dashboards, establishment of North Star metrics, and their calculation logic. Responsible for the complete analytical cycle of the entire game category, covering user acquisition, retention, game progression funnels, player engagement, ad effectiveness, and in-app purchase conversions.

"对于《Coin Trip》/《Ancient Battle》等游戏，通过对玩家付费/活跃/对局/对手交互/内购物品属性等多维特征的建模，利用DeepFM深度学习模型为玩家匹配更合适的破冰内购对象，将目标SKU的顾客转化率提升了35%。同时设计了玩家内购转化的因果推断工程，挖掘购买的核心因素，还为后续实验提供了数据支撑，进一步促进玩家转化，提高用户付费" 翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译

For games such as "Coin Trip" and "Ancient Battle", by modeling multidimensional characteristics including player payment, activity, matchups, opponent interaction, and in-app purchase item attributes, the DeepFM deep learning model was utilized to match players with more suitable in-app purchase targets, resulting in a 35% increase in the conversion rate of targeted SKUs. Additionally, a causal inference project for in-app purchase conversions was developed to identify the core factors influencing purchases, providing data support for subsequent experiments, further facilitating player conversions, and improving user monetization.
我们是撰写简历，所以尽量遵循results在前action在后的叙事规则

Achieved a 35% increase in the conversion rate for targeted SKUs by modeling multidimensional characteristics of players, such as payment, activity, matchups, opponent interaction, and attributes of in-app purchase items in "Coin Trip" and "Ancient Battle" games, employing the DeepFM deep learning model to accurately match players with appropriately targeted in-app purchase offers. Designed a causal inference project to identify key factors driving purchases, laying the foundation for data-driven experimentation, further boosting player conversion rates and enhancing user monetization efforts.

Achieved a 35% increase in the conversion rate for targeted SKUs by modeling multidimensional characteristics of players, such as payment, activity, matchups, opponent interaction, and attributes of in-app purchase items, employing the DeepFM deep learning model to accurately match players with appropriately targeted in-app purchase offers. Designed a causal inference project to identify key factors driving purchases, laying the foundation for data-driven experimentation, further boosting player conversion rates and enhancing user monetization efforts. 感觉有点冗长，能不能精炼一点

Boosted targeted SKU conversion rates by 35% in "Coin Trip" and "Ancient Battle" by leveraging the DeepFM deep learning model to analyze player characteristics—ranging from payment and activity to in-game interactions—and match them with optimal in-app purchase choices. Initiated a causal inference study to pinpoint purchase drivers, enhancing data-driven strategies and further increasing player conversions and monetization.
"通过随机森林模型挖掘用户留存相关性的关键因素，如社交互动、参与运营活动等，并针对社交互动中的是否拥有好友进行因果推断，设计“添加好友”的弹窗实验来提升玩家游戏内活跃，玩家次留从41.5%上涨到45.3%，7留由8.2%上涨到13%" 翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译,撰写简历，所以尽量遵循results在前action在后的叙事规则

Elevated player in-game activity by implementing a "Add Friend" pop-up experiment, driven by causal inference on the impact of having friends within social interactions. Utilizing the Random Forest model, key factors tied to user retention such as social interaction and participation in operational activities were identified. This approach led to an increase of day-2 retention rates from 41.5% to 45.3%, and day-7 retention rates from 8.2% to 13%.
撰写简历，所以尽量遵循results在前action在后的叙事规则

Enhanced player retention by increasing day-2 retention rates from 41.5% to 45.3% and day-7 retention rates from 8.2% to 13% through the strategic implementation of a "Add Friend" pop-up experiment, informed by causal analysis on the significance of social connections within the game. Achieved this by leveraging the Random Forest model to unearth key determinants of user retention, like social engagement and event participation, focusing on the role of friendships in enhancing in-game activity.

“领导客户关系团队实施呆账预测分析，为公司减少了将近$5M的呆账风险，同时节省了以月为单位来联系高风险会员的时间成本和劳动成本。针对呆账样本的多个特征，采用KNN进行遗失值插补，并使用递归特征消除进行特征选择，识别并选取关键指标，如违约天数、信用评分变化、信用使用率、DTI、贷款历史，并通过调整n_estimator, max_depth, max_features等参数，网格搜索等手段优化随机森林模型，将recall提高到78.32%，整体accuracy达到94.48%” 将上述引号内内容翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译，因为是撰写简历，请符合简历该有的格式语言习惯

Led the Customer Relations team in executing bad debt predictive analysis, mitigating nearly $5M in potential bad debt exposure for the company while also saving time and labor costs associated with monthly outreach to high-risk members. For handling missing values in bad debt samples, employed KNN imputation, and utilized Recursive Feature Elimination for feature selection to identify and select key indicators such as days past due, changes in credit score, credit utilization rate, DTI (Debt to Income ratio), and loan history. Optimized the Random Forest model by adjusting parameters like n_estimators, max_depth, and max_features, and through grid search, enhancing recall to 78.32% and overall accuracy to 94.48%.

“收集客户信用数据，并创建客户信用分数相关特征，如循环余额利用率、总交易余额、违约天数等等。使用fviz_cluster函数和‘ggplot2’进行可视化聚类，通过 ‘Average Silhouette’,‘Elbow Method’,‘Within Cluster Variation’等方法找到最佳聚类的潜在K值，并通过不同的K值（4至9）深入探讨每个聚类，并通过直方图、箱线图展示每个聚类，同时制作表格涵盖每个特征的‘mean’信息，特别是信用评分和样本量。结果呈现了一个潜在的新信用等级，平均信用评分为769，等级下限为720分占总数的30.93%，即针对信用等级4级和5级（较差）的合并,最终五档信用合并为四档并沿用至今”  将上述引号内内容翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译，因为是撰写简历，请符合简历该有的格式语言习惯

Collected customer credit data and developed features related to customer credit scores, such as revolving balance utilization, total transaction balance, and days past due. Utilized the 'fviz_cluster' function and 'ggplot2' for visualizing clusters, and applied methods like 'Average Silhouette', 'Elbow Method', and 'Within Cluster Variation' to identify the optimal latent K-values for clustering. Conducted an in-depth analysis of each cluster with varying K-values (4 to 9), presenting each through histograms and box plots, and compiled tables capturing the 'mean' information for each feature, notably credit scores and sample volumes. The analysis revealed a potential new credit rating tier, with an average credit score of 769 and the lower limit at 720, accounting for 30.93% of the total, suggesting a merge of credit ratings 4 and 5 (poor). This resulted in the consolidation of five credit tiers into four, a system still in use today.
稍微精炼一点

Analyzed customer credit data, creating features like revolving utilization, total balance, and days past due. Leveraged 'fviz_cluster' and 'ggplot2' for cluster visualization, employing methods including 'Average Silhouette', 'Elbow Method', and 'Within Cluster Variation' to identify optimal cluster numbers (K-values from 4 to 9). Detailed cluster analyses were visualized with histograms and box plots, and feature averages, especially for credit scores and sample sizes, were tabulated. Uncovered a potential new credit category with an average score of 769, proposing the consolidation of lower credit tiers, effectively reducing five ratings to four, a model adopted to date.

"作为商务分析专员的组长，精通高级Excel，Oracle SQL以及Tableau，擅长索赔保单相关的数据分析及可视化报表制作；擅长预测模型，使用ARIMA，Auto_ARIMA以及Prophet等方法进行时间序列分析，以预测每个承保组的索赔数量。"将上述引号内内容翻译成英文，并符合英文语言习惯，注意互联网行业，数据科学，以及游戏行业的专业术语的翻译，因为是撰写简历，请符合简历该有的格式语言习惯,精炼一点

As a Business Analysis Team Leader, proficient in advanced Excel, Oracle SQL, and Tableau, specializing in data analysis and visualization of claim policies. Skilled in predictive modeling, employing time series analysis methods like ARIMA, Auto_ARIMA, and Prophet to forecast claim volumes for each underwriting group.
Tell us a bit about why you're applying to work here. What excited you about this role? 这是cash app 问我的问题，请结合我的数据科学经历和cash app的愿景来回答，用英文

I am genuinely excited about the prospect of joining Cash App due to its forward-thinking approach in revolutionizing financial transactions and making finance more accessible to everyone. My background in data science, particularly my proficiency in predictive modeling, time series analysis, and deep expertise in tools such as Python, Oracle SQL, and Tableau, aligns well with Cash App’s mission to innovate within the financial sector. I am particularly drawn to Cash App's commitment to using data-driven decisions to enhance user experience and security—areas where I believe my skills can contribute significantly. The opportunity to work on predictive analytics to identify trends, optimize services, and thwart potential security threats excites me, as it aligns with my passion for using data to solve real-world problems. Joining Cash App, a leader at the forefront of financial technology, presents an unparalleled opportunity for me to apply my skills in a dynamic and impactful setting, pushing the boundaries of what's possible in fintech.
精炼成两句话

I am drawn to Cash App's innovative vision of democratizing financial services, which aligns perfectly with my passion and expertise in data science, especially in predictive modeling and analytics. The opportunity to leverage my skills in a leading fintech environment to drive data-driven decisions and enhance user experiences is incredibly exciting to me.
结合我的背景，和alma 一家mental care公司的愿景，讲讲why am i interested in alma as a senior product analyst

My background in data science and a deep-seated passion for leveraging analytics to drive meaningful outcomes naturally align with Alma's vision of transforming mental health care through innovation and accessibility. As a Senior Product Analyst, I am particularly excited by the prospect of using my skills to analyze data and derive insights that can directly contribute to Alma's mission of improving mental health services, making care more personalized, effective, and accessible for all.
精炼一点，主要提及我在product analytics以及experimentation的经验

Leveraging my extensive experience in product analytics and experimentation, I am thrilled about the opportunity to contribute to Alma's mission of innovating mental health care. My passion for utilizing data to enhance product development and user experience aligns with Alma's goals, motivating my interest in joining the team as a Senior Product Analyst.
